experience.title: Staff Accountant
bullets: full-cycle accounting for multiple Sysco operating companies

skills_and_achievements: Advanced Excel (macros, VLOOKUPs, formulas, Smart View), MS Office, SAP, PeopleSoft, Business Objects, financial modeling, complex problem solving, time management; built a reconciliation system and quality-control program that improved effectiveness by 25% and boosted departmental productivity by 15%; experienced with GAAP, SOX, grants, and policy/process optimization.
